segments.text: Hello? I was saying, why did you cut the call?
segments.speaker: customer

segments.text: Oh, I didn't cut it. I was out of a session, so I didn't get it.
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: Yes, yes, no, I'm just saying, do you agree that all the information you've given is completely correct, and for policy purposes, all of this will be recorded, okay?
segments.speaker: customer
